commands.review_summary:
The branch moves per-turn media task hints below the system-prompt cache boundary in embedded and CLI prompt assembly, adds cache-boundary regression coverage, and refreshes adjacent test type/lint expectations.

PR surface: Source +54, Tests +191. Total +245 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection of current main shows media task hints are composed through the static prependSystemContext path above the cache boundary in both embedded and CLI runners. I did not run tests because this review is read-only, but the PR adds focused regressions that target that source path.
